subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Strive thou that thou mayest be content and that God may be well-pleased with thee. If thou shouldst attain unto the word of contentment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله جهد نما تا تو خوشنود باشی و حق از تو راضی اگر بکلمه رضا موفق شوی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
